patterns: Why do we need a GPU for AI
responses: A GPU (Graphics Processing Unit) runs thousands of simple calculations in parallel, which is exactly what neural network training needs. The H200 is NVIDIA's data-center GPU with 141GB of memory, built for large AI models.
A Transformer processes an entire sequence at once using self-attention, letting every word relate to every other word directly. This is the architecture behind BERT, GPT, and most modern LLMs.
I'm not sure I understand. Could you rephrase that?
